calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Karen Farnsworth CSR #5162 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Kongmy Phonseya, is present.
Attorney, Clifford Y Wang, present representing the petitioner.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Kongmy Phonseya is sworn and examined by the Court. Counsel informs the Court that Section 6c on the Petition for Change of Name is incorrect and is orally corrected as follows: Petitioner's reason for the change of name is to add an American MIDDLE name and NOT a FIRST name.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: KONGMY SAM PHONSEYA. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
